double_ratchet.DHs: This party's local Diffie-Hellman ratchet key pair (private + public). The public part is sent in headers, while the private part stays local for DH computations. It rotates on DH ratchet steps for forward secrecy.
double_ratchet.DHr: The latest remote party Diffie-Hellman ratchet public key received from the peer. It is combined with the local DHs private key to derive fresh secrets.
double_ratchet.RK: Root key for the Double Ratchet. It evolves during DH ratchet updates and is used to derive new sending and receiving chain keys.
double_ratchet.CKs: Sending chain key. It advances for each outgoing message and derives a one-time message key for encryption.
double_ratchet.CKr: Receiving chain key. It advances for each incoming message and derives the matching message key for decryption.
double_ratchet.Ns: Number of messages sent in the current sending chain.
double_ratchet.Nr: Number of messages received in the current receiving chain.
double_ratchet.PN: Length of the previous sending chain before the last DH ratchet step.
double_ratchet.MKSKIPPED: Storage for skipped message keys used to decrypt out-of-order messages. Entries are indexed by remote DH key and message number.
double_ratchet.header_dh: Header DH ratchet public key attached to this message. It identifies the sender ratchet step and is public metadata.
double_ratchet.header_pn: Header PN (previous chain length). It tells how many messages were sent in the sender's previous sending chain.
double_ratchet.header_n: Header message number N in the current sending chain. It is public metadata used for ordering and skipped-key handling.
double_ratchet.step_viz_plaintext: User message in plaintext before encryption.
double_ratchet.step_viz_sender_before_dhs: Current local DHs public key (public part of the local DH ratchet key pair).
double_ratchet.step_viz_sender_before_ns: Current sending message number before this send.
double_ratchet.step_viz_sender_before_cks: Current sending chain key before ratchet step.
double_ratchet.step_viz_sender_before_panel: Sender state snapshot before processing the message.
double_ratchet.step_viz_send_chain_cks: Sending chain key for symmetric ratchet.
double_ratchet.step_viz_kdf_ck: Symmetric-key KDF: derives next CKs and message key mk.
double_ratchet.step_viz_new_cks: Next sending chain key stored back into state.
double_ratchet.step_viz_message_key: One-time message key used for encrypting this message.
double_ratchet.step_viz_state_update: Sender state update after the send-chain step: CKs rotates to a fresh chain key and Ns increments by 1.
double_ratchet.step_viz_encrypt_plaintext: Same plaintext that will be encrypted.
double_ratchet.step_viz_ad_header: Concatenated associated data and header fed into ENCRYPT.
double_ratchet.step_viz_encrypt_fn: Authenticated encryption using mk and AD||header.
double_ratchet.step_viz_header_dhs: Sender's local DHs public key used when constructing the header.
double_ratchet.step_viz_header_pn: Previous sending chain length placed in header.
double_ratchet.step_viz_header_n: Current message number placed in header.
double_ratchet.step_viz_header_fn: Builds the protocol header from DHs, PN and N.
double_ratchet.step_viz_header_output: Header attached to the outgoing ciphertext.
double_ratchet.step_viz_sender_after_cks: Updated sending chain key after this send.
double_ratchet.step_viz_sender_after_panel: Sender state snapshot after send processing.
double_ratchet.step_viz_sent_before_dhs: Sender's local DHs public key before sending.
double_ratchet.step_viz_pending_queue: Message is queued and waiting to be received by the recipient.
double_ratchet.step_viz_sent_after_dhs: Sender's local DHs public key after sending (unchanged in this step).
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_header: Incoming message header containing DH ratchet key and counters used for receive-side state updates.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_ciphertext: Encrypted payload received from the sender.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_before_dhr: Receiver's currently stored remote public DH key (DHr) before processing this incoming header.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_before_rk: Root key before handling this received message.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_before_ckr: Receiving chain key before this receive step.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_before_nr: Number of messages already received in the current receiving chain before this message.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_before_panel: Receiver state snapshot before message processing.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_skipped_lookup: Lookup key used for skipped-message cache check: (header.dh, header.n).
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_skipped_check: Checks whether a previously skipped key already exists in MKSKIPPED for this incoming message.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_skipped_path: If HIT, receiver decrypts directly with stored skipped key. If MISS, receiver continues with ratchet processing.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_fast_forward: When MKSKIPPED misses and header.n is ahead, the receiver advances CKr/Nr through missing indices, stores derived keys in MKSKIPPED, and stops at the target message index.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_header_dh: DH value from the incoming header.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_compare_dh: Incoming header DH public key is compared with stored remote public key DHr to determine whether a DH ratchet step is needed.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_ratchet_decision: Based on DH comparison, the receiver either continues in current chain or performs a DH ratchet update.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_ckr: Receiving chain key input for symmetric receive ratchet.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_kdf_ck: Symmetric-key KDF for receiving chain: derives next CKr and the message key used for decryption.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_new_ckr: Updated receiving chain key stored after deriving the message key.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_message_key: One-time receive message key derived for this ciphertext.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_decrypt_cipher: Ciphertext input passed into authenticated decryption.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_decrypt_ad: Associated data with header bound into authenticated decryption.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_decrypt_fn: Authenticated decryption of ciphertext with derived message key.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_after_dhr: Stored remote public DH key (DHr) after processing this message.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_after_rk: Root key after receive-side ratchet updates.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_after_ckr: Receiving chain key after this message.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_delivered: Message is delivered to recipient and stored in message log.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_dh_ratchet_before_dhs: Local DHs public key before applying DHRatchet.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_dh_ratchet_after_dhs: Newly generated local DHs public key after DHRatchet.
double_ratchet.step_viz_receive_dh_ratchet_apply: DH ratchet transition: update DHr from header, derive fresh RK/CKr, generate new DHs, derive new RK/CKs, and reset counters.
